## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss scaling customer operations as GrowthX grows its customer base 3-4x](https://fathom.video/share/88SRRREJJ9x3qKr9gG6ys843Qzrpvxt7?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need to transition from relying on director-level experts to a more scalable model with tiered service levels and specialized pods](https://fathom.video/share/88SRRREJJ9x3qKr9gG6ys843Qzrpvxt7?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Importance of setting clear client expectations around engagement model and KPIs from the start](https://fathom.video/share/88SRRREJJ9x3qKr9gG6ys843Qzrpvxt7?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Opportunity to develop more standardized onboarding processes, templates, and client-facing dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/88SRRREJJ9x3qKr9gG6ys843Qzrpvxt7?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Long-term vision is to build an AI-powered platform that transforms knowledge work, with the agency as a proving ground](https://fathom.video/share/88SRRREJJ9x3qKr9gG6ys843Qzrpvxt7?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)

## Topics

### Current Onboarding Process

  - [Heavy reliance on director-level pod leaders for discovery/strategy](https://fathom.video/share/88SRRREJJ9x3qKr9gG6ys843Qzrpvxt7?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Time-intensive custom AI model refinement during foundation/calibration](https://fathom.video/share/88SRRREJJ9x3qKr9gG6ys843Qzrpvxt7?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [Challenge: Can't scale hiring director-level expertise indefinitely](https://fathom.video/share/88SRRREJJ9x3qKr9gG6ys843Qzrpvxt7?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Proposed Improvements

  - [Advanced customer segmentation: Specialized pods by industry](https://fathom.video/share/88SRRREJJ9x3qKr9gG6ys843Qzrpvxt7?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
  - [Split foundation and calibration stages to increase client buy-in](https://fathom.video/share/88SRRREJJ9x3qKr9gG6ys843Qzrpvxt7?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [Transition to "maintenance mode" post-calibration with tiered support](https://fathom.video/share/88SRRREJJ9x3qKr9gG6ys843Qzrpvxt7?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [Standardized templates for onboarding, expectations, project plans](https://fathom.video/share/88SRRREJJ9x3qKr9gG6ys843Qzrpvxt7?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)
  - [Consider client-facing dashboards focused on agreed KPIs](https://fathom.video/share/88SRRREJJ9x3qKr9gG6ys843Qzrpvxt7?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)

### Scaling Challenges

  - [Clients get attached to high-touch service from directors](https://fathom.video/share/88SRRREJJ9x3qKr9gG6ys843Qzrpvxt7?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
  - [Multiple work streams for larger clients make it hard to reach steady state](https://fathom.video/share/88SRRREJJ9x3qKr9gG6ys843Qzrpvxt7?tab=summary&timestamp=1605.0)
  - [Need to balance high-touch service for top clients vs. scalable model for growth](https://fathom.video/share/88SRRREJJ9x3qKr9gG6ys843Qzrpvxt7?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
  - [Difficulty in attributing results directly to GrowthX's work](https://fathom.video/share/88SRRREJJ9x3qKr9gG6ys843Qzrpvxt7?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)

### Long-term Vision

  - [Build AI-powered platform to transform knowledge work](https://fathom.video/share/88SRRREJJ9x3qKr9gG6ys843Qzrpvxt7?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
  - [Agency serves as proving ground for 10x efficiency gains](https://fathom.video/share/88SRRREJJ9x3qKr9gG6ys843Qzrpvxt7?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
  - [Exact product/business model still evolving](https://fathom.video/share/88SRRREJJ9x3qKr9gG6ys843Qzrpvxt7?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Define clearer internal consensus on priority KPIs to focus on with clients](https://fathom.video/share/88SRRREJJ9x3qKr9gG6ys843Qzrpvxt7?tab=summary&timestamp=2032.0)
  - [Develop standardized templates for onboarding, project plans, messaging](https://fathom.video/share/88SRRREJJ9x3qKr9gG6ys843Qzrpvxt7?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)
  - [Explore options for client-facing dashboards or reporting](https://fathom.video/share/88SRRREJJ9x3qKr9gG6ys843Qzrpvxt7?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
  - [Consider tiered service model as company scales](https://fathom.video/share/88SRRREJJ9x3qKr9gG6ys843Qzrpvxt7?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)
  - [Improve processes for gathering product feedback from client-facing teams](https://fathom.video/share/88SRRREJJ9x3qKr9gG6ys843Qzrpvxt7?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
